headline: Synchrony to Participate in the Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) Chief Financial Officer, Brian J. Wenzel, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley US Financials Conference on Tuesday, June 9, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. (Eastern Time).
